creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
The reason for the garbage characters is unknown though is still being  
looked into.  I see no reason to mark the port as broken for SSL just  
to push it up to 2.10, short of a compelling functional  
incompatibility or security reason.  As you could imagine, a large  
number of users use it's SSL features and I need to look after them  
too ;-)

Jarrod.
